---
title: "Exploring Storms"
author: "kinsongao-bit"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
suppressPackageStartupMessages()
```

## Named Storms per Year

```{r storm-plot}
storms %>%
  filter(!is.na(name), name != "") %>%
  distinct(year, name) %>%
  count(year) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = year, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "steelblue") +
  labs(
    title = "Number of Named Storms per Year",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Named Storms"
  ) +
  theme_minimal()
```
